Package org.eventb.core

Interface ISCMachineRoot

All Superinterfaces:
IAccuracyElement, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IConfigurationElement, IElementManipulation, IEventBRoot, IGeneratedElement, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Implementing Classes:
SCMachineRoot
public interface ISCMachineRoot extends IEventBRoot, IAccuracyElement, IConfigurationElement
Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) machine files.

An SC machine file has a name that is returned by IRodinElement.getElementName().

The elements contained in an event-B SC machine file are:
  • at most one refines clause (ISCRefinesMachine)
  • sees clauses (ISCSeesContext)
  • internal contexts (ISCInternalContext)
  • variables (ISCVariable)
  • invariants (ISCInvariant)
  • theorems (ISCTheorem)
  • events (ISCEvent)
  • at most one variant (ISCVariant)

The internal contexts are a local copy of the contents of the contexts seen, directly or indirectly, by this machine. The other child elements of this machine are the SC versions of the elements of the unchecked version of this machine. In addition, access methods for related file handles are provided.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IRodinElement.getElementName()

      static final IInternalElementType<ISCMachineRoot> ELEMENT_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • getAbstractSCMachines

      IRodinFile[] getAbstractSCMachines() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns a handle to the statically checked versions of the abstractions of this SC machine.
      Returns:
      a array of handles to the statically checked versions of the abstractions
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or if one abstract SC machine is invalid
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • getSCRefinesClause

      ISCRefinesMachine getSCRefinesClause(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC refines clause with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC refines clause
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC refines clause with the given element name

    • getSCRefinesClauses

      ISCRefinesMachine[] getSCRefinesClauses() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of all SC refines clauses of this SC machine.
      Returns:
      an array of SC refines clauses
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCSeenContext

      ISCInternalContext getSCSeenContext(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC internal context with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC internal context
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC internal context with the given element name

    • getSCSeenContexts

      ISCInternalContext[] getSCSeenContexts() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the internal SC contexts that are (transitively) seen by this SC machine.
      Returns:
      an array of all internal contexts
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCSeesClause

      ISCSeesContext getSCSeesClause(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC sees clause with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC sees clause
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC sees clause with the given element name

    • getSCSeesClauses

      ISCSeesContext[] getSCSeesClauses() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of all SC sees clauses of this SC machine.
      Returns:
      an array of SC sees clauses
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCVariable

      ISCVariable getSCVariable(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC variable with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC variable
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC variable with the given element name

    • getSCVariables

      ISCVariable[] getSCVariables() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array containing all SC variables of this SC machine.
      Returns:
      an array of all SC variables
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCInvariant

      ISCInvariant getSCInvariant(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC invariant with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC invariant
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC invariant with the given element name

      ISCInvariant[] getSCInvariants() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array containing all SC invariants of this SC machine.

      an array of all SC invariants
      Throws:

      ISCEvent getSCEvent(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC event with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC event
      Returns:

      ISCEvent[] getSCEvents() throws RodinDBException

      ISCVariant getSCVariant(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC variant with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC variant
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC variant with the given element name

    • getSCVariants

      ISCVariant[] getSCVariants() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the array containing all SC variants of this SC machine.
      Returns:
      the array of all SC variants
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getTypeEnvironment

      ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the type environment defined by this machine file. The returned type environment is made of all carrier sets and constants defined in the seen contexts and their abstractions, together with the variables declared in this machine and its abstractions.

      It can be used subsequently to type-check the invariants and theorems of this machine. It can also be used as a basis for building the type environment of an event of this machine.

      Returns:
      the type environment of this machine
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or computing the type environment
      Since:
      3.0
